packets.title: Chief Executive Officer
packets.why_now_signal: Flosum is actively hiring for Director, Revenue Operations, indicating immediate GTM systems and forecasting pressure.
packets.value_hypothesis: A focused RevOps operating cadence can improve pipeline visibility, accelerate qualification, and increase forecast reliability within one quarter.
packets.primary_message: Hi CEO—noticed Flosum is hiring for 'Director, Revenue Operations'. That usually signals a scale point where pipeline definitions, stage hygiene, and forecast ownership need to tighten quickly. I help teams install practical RevOps operating cadence that improves visibility and cuts cycle drag without heavy process overhead. If useful, I can share a focused 1-page teardown showing where your funnel likely leaks and a 30-day stabilization plan tied to conversion and forecast confidence.
packets.follow_up_48h: Quick bump—if helpful, I can send a short RevOps scorecard tailored to the 'Director, Revenue Operations' mandate so your team can prioritize the highest-impact fixes first.
packets.cta: Open to a 15-minute hiring conversation next week?
packets.value_artifact_suggestion: Mini RevOps scorecard + 30-day pipeline stabilization plan.
